title: NBA Finals City Duel Poster AI Prompt
sourceTitle: NBA Finals City Duel Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical NBA Finals 2026 city-duel editorial poster built around Victor Wembanyama in authentic black San Antonio Spurs number 1 uniform facing Jalen Brunson in authentic white New York Knicks number 11 uniform. Subject: Victor Wembanyama in authentic black San Antonio Spurs number 1 uniform facing Jalen Brunson in authentic white New York Knicks number 11 uniform anchors the matchup: Wembanyama appears extremely tall and imposing while Brunson is closer to camera with calm confidence and the basketball. Scene: New York skyline at sunset with Empire State Building and Madison Square Garden lights, orange-blue Knicks city glow against black-and-silver Spurs shadows; the city acts as the third character between Spurs scale and Knicks resilience. Composition: Vertical 4:5 sports fantasy poster with Wembanyama towering on one side, Brunson lower and closer in the foreground, skyline and Madison Square Garden behind them, and clean space for Finals typography. Signature Elements: Preserved nba finals wemby vs brunson city duel poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Cinematic sports fantasy fan poster with realistic player likeness, premium collectible Finals artwork, dramatic rim light, polished color grading, and editorial social-poster finish. Color Palette: Knicks orange and royal blue city glow against Spurs black and silver shadows, sunset gold, arena whites, and deep cinematic contrast. Lighting: Dramatic rim light around both athletes, sunset skyline glow, arena light accents, and strong separation between giant-scale figure and foreground guard. Typography: NBA Finals 2026 / KNICKS IN 5 / The city answered / Knicks lead 3-1 / Game 4 / 29-point comeback appears as clean secondary poster typography with NBA Finals 2026 mark, title, subtitle, and footer context. Restrictions: Keep Wembanyama, Brunson, Spurs, Knicks, and NBA Finals identity recognizable;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
